courseleaf.title: Master of Preventive Veterinary Medicine
courseleaf.informationtext:
Janet Foley, D.V.M., Ph.D., Chairperson of the Group

Group Office

1022 Veterinary Medicine Administrative Building; 530-752-2657; Master of Preventive Veterinary Medicine; Faculty

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Preventive Veterinary Medicine.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: Using state-of-the-art methods in epidemiology, the Preventive Veterinary Medicine Program prepares veterinarians to investigate and evaluate disease and production problems in animal populations and to design, evaluate, and implement disease control or other veterinary services programs.
